DISCOVERY 612, HEARING HELD AND TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED: DEFENDANTS CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE INSURANCE'S MOTION TO COMPEL THE CITY COLLEGE OF SAN FRANCISCO TO COMPLY WITH DEFENDANTS' SUBPOENA OF RECORDS IS DENIED. THE COURT FINDS THAT THERE IS A RIGHT TO PRIVACY THAT ATTACHES TO THE RECORDS THAT ARE SOUGHT BY THE SUBPOENA. DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. (SEE MINI MINUTES FOR DETAILS). COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Nov-09-2007 Off Calendar

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Oct-03-2007 Vacated

Ntc Of Mtn To Compel Further Response To Supplemental Interrogatory From Plntf
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED.
Defendants' CALIFORNIA STATE AUTOMOBILE ASSOCIATION AND TERRY MCRHOADS' Motion To Compel Further Response To Supplemental Interrogatory is granted. The interrogatory requests the identification of the answer which is being supplemented. If objections were made to a particular interrogatory and not overruled, the response must identify the specific interrogatory and assert that any later acquired evidence is subject to the same objections. Any objections that have not been overruled, must be asserted again to individual responses and other responses must be supplemented as necessary. Each of those responses must be separately identified. The objections to the supplemental interrogatory as a whole are overruled. As the response incorporates other matters, it is inadequate. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-03-2007 Case Settled - Set For Crc 3.1385 Hrg On Dec-04-07 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Feb-26-2007 Set For Trial On Oct-22-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Oct-04-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 303

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Compel The City College Of S.F. To Comply With Deft'S Subpoena Of Records And For Monetary Sanctions From Plntf
Off Calendar Aug-13-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Lisa A. Costelo, Esq., appeared for Defendant & moving party: California State Automobile Association, Terri McRhoads
Demian I. Oksenendler, Esq., appeared for plaintiff & opposing party: Elena Aloman

Ruling:
Hearing held and tentative ruling adopted: Defendants California State Automobile Insurance's Motion To Compel The City College Of San Francisco To Comply With Defendants' Subpoena Of Records is denied. The court finds that there is a right to privacy that attaches to the records that are sought by the subpoena. The court further finds that the subpoena is overly broad and that there is no good cause to compel the production or the records sought by the subpoena.
Defendant's request for sanctions is denied. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-26-2007 Off Calendar

Ntc Of Motion And Motion For Protecive Order
